input: Revenue is up 12% month-over-month but profit margin dropped 3 points. How should a dashboard narrative explain this?

My dashboard shows user signups up 25% but activation rate dropped from 40% to 28%. What insight should I highlight?
How do I explain a metric that hasn't changed in months? Is no change worth reporting?
What makes a good dashboard narrative versus just listing the numbers?
